case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & VS. ADRIANA ALVARADO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2015 - CONTINUED FOR DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-14-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF MUST RE-SERVE THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

NO APPEARANCES. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE--DEFENDANT WAS SUB-SERVED BUT POS DOES NOT SAY WHO WAS SERVED. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
